src: bridge between mattermost, IRC, gitter, xmpp, slack, discord, telegram, rocketchat, twitch, ssh-chat, zulip, whatsapp, keybase, matrix, microsoft teams, nextcloud, mumble, vk and more with REST API (mattermost not required!)
ja: mattermost、IRC、gitter、xmpp、slack、discord、telegram、rocketchat、twitch、ssh-chat、zulip、whatsapp、keybase、matrix、Microsoft Teams、nextcloud、mumble、vkなどを橋渡し。REST API付き(mattermost不要)
